These rolls are assembled from uncirculated coins from original ballistic bags straight from the U.S. Mint. Coins may display bag marks, minor abrasions caused by contact between pieces during the minting process, or while stored and transported inside a mint bag.

These sets are assembled from uncirculated coins from original ballistic bags or rolls straight from the U.S. Mint. Coins may display bag marks, minor abrasions caused by contact between pieces during the minting process, or while stored and transported inside a mint bag.
These sets are not brand new. Some of the coins may show signs of age such as toning and spots.
These sets are not brand new. The packaging may show signs of wear such as minor folds and scrapes.
This coin may display blemishes from storage or incorrect handling, such as toning, milk spots, cloudy fields, contact marks, etc. Please look at the images carefully before bidding.
